title: Frequent Traders
description: The Frequent Traders mod for Minecraft greatly increases the spawn rate of Wandering Traders with a flexible and easy-to-configure system.
body:
# Frequent Traders Mod

- Increases the spawn rate of Wandering Traders significantly

- Highly configurable spawn timing and chances

- Optional llamas spawn with traders for immersive gameplay

- Respects other mods for smooth compatibility

- Perfect for players seeking more trading opportunities and lively worlds
